caveats: Codex sandbox SSH is intermittently blocked; fall back to Claude-direct edits via scp (do not retry codex-rescue on the same task).
HOT3D sequences are 1392-3726 NPZ frames; smoke runs must pass max_frames=5 (load_sequence_gt accepts it; ~12s vs >2min).
Minor scope addition vs spec: max_frames kwarg on load_sequence_gt / _load_processed_frame_index (default None, backwards-compatible).
